title: NEO 3.1-F Governed Artifact Class Map (producer/validator separation)
description: Assigns every governed artifact to exactly one CLASS by filename/path glob (first matching rule wins; unmatched -> default_class). Judging classes are constraint | test_harness | profile_risk; a builder may not co-modify an implementation-class artifact and a judging-class artifact that grades it in one gated slice (verify_app_slice AS18). Globs are matched against the normalized changed path AND its leaf. Ratified P1-S3: all 18 .neo/scripts classified explicitly (no default catch-all for them); the 3 active role SKILL.md bodies are judging (constraint - they define the graders). Ratified P4-S0(+fix): the orchestrator enforcement engine and its shared root resolver are registered judging via orchestrator.ps1 + orch_*.ps1 + _neo_root.ps1 (test_harness); name-pattern registration covers exactly these files - additional engine helpers must be registered explicitly when introduced.

rules.note: JUDGING: validator/checker engines + fixture/proof suites that produce the verdict/evidence (13 of the 18 governed scripts + the fixture-suite pattern + P4-S0(+fix): the orchestrator enforcement engine and its shared root resolver via orchestrator.ps1, orch_*.ps1 and _neo_root.ps1; name-pattern registration covers exactly these files - additional engine helpers must be registered explicitly when introduced)
JUDGING: rubrics / invariants / schemas that define pass-fail, plus the 3 active role SKILL.md bodies (they define the graders / duties / gates)
JUDGING: per-app risk surface: profile (denylist + risk_tokens live inside it), tier/release rules
neutral (neither impl nor judging for the co-modification rule): produced outputs + the provenance record

explicit: the 2 scaffolder scripts among the 18 governed scripts (all others of the 18 are test_harness above); everything else falls through to default_class=implementation (app source, docs, role router, tools)
